task: Docs-only correction to MILEAGE-MODEL-DESIGN.md per Jorge's locked lifecycle (03-MILEAGE-LIFECYCLE-LOCKED). Adds §1A 'Load mileage lifecycle': the three mile numbers fire at DIFFERENT lifecycle points, not one screen — practical (+short) captured in the load wizard; SHORT drives the VENDOR BILL at driver assignment (driver pay); PRACTICAL drives the CUSTOMER INVOICE at delivery; ACTUAL streams from Samsara for profitability (not entered/invoiced). Two lifecycle triggers, not one save (short→bill@assign, practical→invoice@deliver). Adds the true-profitability view (charged practical vs driven actual → true $/actual-mile vs quoted $/practical-mile). Updates §7 build-step 2 accordingly. No code, no migration, no money path.
